query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE erpCompanyId = 1) as customers,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE erpCompanyId = 1) as products,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE erpCompanyId = 1) as orders,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quotations WHERE erpCompanyId = 1) as quotations;
